title: Additive entity
description: An additive record (DATA-11). Metadata fields (id, slug, name, eNumber, synonyms) are plain scalars. Fact-bearing fields reuse the SourcedValue envelope by $ref (DATA-09). The GB regulatory-position field is marked claimDomain regulatory for the TRUST-06 gate. Verification and publication status are reserved for the Phase 2 gate.

synonyms.description: Alternative names this additive is known by.

function.description: Fact-bearing: a descriptive account of the additive's technological function, sourced.

regulatoryStatus.description: Fact-bearing regulatory-position field. Marked claimDomain regulatory so the TRUST-06 referential gate (plan 01-05) can key on it.

verificationStatus.description: Reserved for the Phase 2 verification gate (DATA-11); present-and-empty (null) validates.

publicationStatus.description: Reserved for the Phase 2 publication gate (DATA-11); present-and-empty (null) validates.
